name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
PriceWatch tracks crypto prices and alerts you when thresholds are hit.

Tap /start to open the menu, then:
• 📋 Watchlist — add or remove tickers
• ➕ Add Alert — set price or percent alerts
• 💰 Price — check current prices
• 🔕 Quiet Hours — pause alerts at night
• 🌅 Morning Summary — daily price digest

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
